'''zhashozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabies|scabies]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabies|scabies]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhashozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshezeth|zhæshezeth]] || [[word:zhæshezej|zhæshezej]] || [[word:zhæshezesh|zhæshezesh]] || [[word:zhæsheze|zhæsheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashoshozoth|zhashoshozoth]] || [[word:zhashoshozoj|zhashoshozoj]] || [[word:zhashoshozosh|zhashoshozosh]] || [[word:zhashoshozo|zhashoshozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashozoth|zhashozoth]] || [[word:zhashozoj|zhashozoj]] || [[word:zhashozosh|zhashozosh]] || [[word:zhashozo|zhashozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashofzoth|zhashofzoth]] || [[word:zhashofzoj|zhashofzoj]] || [[word:zhashofzosh|zhashofzosh]] || [[word:zhashofzof|zhashofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhashozotho|zhashozotho]] || [[word:zhashozojo|zhashozojo]] || [[word:zhashozosho|zhashozosho]] || [[word:zhashozoko|zhashozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhashozoth|zhashozoth]] || [[word:zhashozoj|zhashozoj]] || [[word:zhashozosh|zhashozosh]] || [[word:zhashozo|zhashozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhashozothol|zhashozothol]] || [[word:zhashozojol|zhashozojol]] || [[word:zhashozoshol|zhashozoshol]] || [[word:zhashozokol|zhashozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhashozothotho|zhashozothotho]] || [[word:zhashozojojo|zhashozojojo]] || [[word:zhashozoshosho|zhashozoshosho]] || [[word:zhashozoko|zhashozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhashozothon|zhashozothon]] || [[word:zhashozojon|zhashozojon]] || [[word:zhashozoshon|zhashozoshon]] || [[word:zhashozokon|zhashozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhashozothoro|zhashozothoro]] || [[word:zhashozojoro|zhashozojoro]] || [[word:zhashozoshoro|zhashozoshoro]] || [[word:zhashozokoro|zhashozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
